name: kui-react
description: Machine-readable catalog of every component, theme, design token, and convention in the kui-react library. Consume this from an AI assistant to know what exists, where it lives, and how to use it.

layers.ui: modules/ui/ — Primitive, locally-stateful components (atoms + molecules). No business logic. Every file starts with 'use client' and imports cn from @/libs/utils/cn.
layers.app: modules/app/ — Application-level patterns (organisms, page shells, forms, providers). May own local state and orchestrate ui-layer atoms.
layers.domain: modules/domains/<vertical>/ — Industry-vertical components that compose ui/ + app/. Each vertical exports a barrel index.ts and a types.ts with Zod schemas.
layers.theme: app/theme/<vertical>/ — Full multi-page demos wiring domain components into a realistic product experience. layout.tsx is client, page.tsx is server unless it owns state.
layers.library: External npm packages featured in the showcase (e.g. kui-viewer). filePath points to the showcase example, not first-party source; the `external` field carries homepage/npm/github links.

conventions.icons: All icons MUST come from Font Awesome. Named imports only — never the whole set. Apply Tailwind classes via className (e.g. text-primary, w-4 h-4); never use the size prop with raw strings. aria-hidden="true" on decorative icons.
conventions.styling: Tailwind CSS 4 with CSS-variable design tokens. Use cn() from @/libs/utils/cn for class composition — never raw template literals. Reference token names (bg-primary, text-text-secondary) — never hex.
conventions.types: Define props inline with a local type. Domain layers use Zod schemas in types.ts. Components export named functions — never default exports (excluding next/dynamic wrappers).
conventions.accessibility: Use semantic HTML. Apply aria-busy / aria-invalid / aria-describedby / aria-pressed / aria-expanded as relevant. ALWAYS include focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-border-focus on interactive elements. Use disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed for disabled state.
conventions.fileNaming: UI/Domain components: PascalCase .tsx. Showcase builders: kebab-case .showcase.tsx. Utilities: camelCase .ts. Domain directories: lowercase.
conventions.pathAlias: @/ resolves to the project root. Import as: @/modules/ui/<Component>, @/modules/app/<Component>, @/modules/domains/<vertical>, @/libs/utils/cn.

components.name: Button
components.description: Core interactive element. Supports 5 visual styles (variants) and 5 sizes. disabled, loading and selected states are built-in.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Status, category or label indicator. 6 semantic variants, 3 sizes, dot and dismissible support.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: User profile photo or initials indicator. 5 sizes with optional status dot. When no image is provided, initials render on a bg-primary-subtle / text-primary tile.

components.name: Spinner
components.description: CSS border-based loading indicator. Does not require FontAwesome. 5 sizes, border-border / border-t-primary colour system.

components.name: Skeleton
components.description: Animated placeholder shown before content loads. Uses animate-pulse bg-surface-sunken. aria-busy="true" ensures accessibility.

components.name: ButtonGroup
components.description: Segmented button group for mutually-exclusive options. Supports 4 variants, 4 sizes and disabled items.

components.name: SkipLink + LiveRegion
components.description: SkipLink is visually hidden until focused, enabling keyboard users to bypass navigation. LiveRegion announces dynamic content to screen readers.

components.name: BrandLogo
components.description: Square brand mark with rounded corners. Renders a single letter or short token on a primary-coloured tile. 5 sizes (sm → 2xl).

components.name: StarRating
components.description: Five-star rating indicator. Read-only by default with decimal/half-star rendering; pass `readonly={false}` + `onChange` for interactive whole-star selection.
components.whenToUse: Surface a 0–5 star score (e.g. product / hotel / restaurant ratings) or let users submit a new rating.
components.whenNotToUse: For non-star scales (e.g. NPS, percentages) use ContentScoreBar or a custom indicator instead.

components.name: Input
components.description: Text input field with label, hint, error, prefix icon, password toggle, and 3 size variants.

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Label + textarea + hint + error anatomy. Vertical resizing is enabled via resize-y and the parts are linked through aria-describedby.

components.name: SearchBar
components.description: role="searchbox" with search icon and clear button. Works in controlled and uncontrolled modes.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Label + checkbox + optional hint / error message. aria-describedby is wired up and border-error is applied on the error state.

components.name: RadioGroup
components.description: fieldset + legend based radio group. WCAG-compliant keyboard navigation with an optional card-style variant.

components.name: Toggle
components.description: role="switch" toggle/switch with three sizes, description slot, and disabled support. Fully accessible via CSS transform without a native input.

components.name: CheckboxGroup
components.description: Chip-style multi-select group. Selected chips use bg-primary-subtle / border-primary tokens. Keyboard accessible.

components.name: Select
components.description: Label + select + hint + error anatomy. appearance-none overrides the native dropdown style and renders a chevron icon.

components.name: TagInput
components.description: Free-text input that creates chips. Add tags with Enter or comma, double-click to edit, Backspace to delete. Duplicates are ignored.

components.name: MultiSelect
components.description: Chip-based multi-select popover with searchable filter, keyboard navigation, and disabled-option support.

components.name: ComboBox
components.description: Searchable autocomplete single-select with keyboard navigation, described options, and a clearable button.

components.name: DatePicker
components.description: Popover-based date picker with a locale-aware calendar grid (TR / EN), quick month / year jump from the header, min / max / disabledDates support, and full keyboard navigation (Arrow / PageUp/Down / Shift+Page / Home / End / Enter / Esc). Pixel-identical EJS sibling at modules/ui/DatePicker/DatePicker.ejs.

components.name: DateRangePicker
components.description: Two-month popover for picking a start → end date range. Shares the same Calendar core as DatePicker; locale-aware, fully keyboard navigable, with min/max/disabledDates. Pixel-identical EJS sibling at modules/ui/DatePicker/DateRangePicker.ejs.

components.name: FileInput
components.description: Drag-and-drop file upload with validation, file list, and individual remove actions. M1 adds paste-from-clipboard, `accept` MIME-pattern + extension validation, and `maxFiles` enforcement with i18n messages. Pixel-identical EJS sibling at modules/ui/FileInput/FileInput.ejs.

components.name: ColorPicker
components.description: Color selection control with a 32-swatch preset palette plus optional hex input and native browser color picker for unlimited colors. M1 adds a HEX / RGBA / HSLA / HWB / OKLCH format-switcher with per-format input + copy. Pixel-identical EJS sibling at modules/ui/ColorPicker/ColorPicker.ejs. Used by RichTextEditor for text + highlight colors.

components.name: DiffViewer
components.description: Line-based text diff viewer with unified (GitHub-style) and split (yan yana) modes. M1 ships a zero-dep LCS algorithm, hunk headers in `@@ -old,n +new,n @@` form, old/new line-number gutters, configurable context window, and optional collapsible unchanged regions. Pixel-identical EJS sibling at modules/ui/DiffViewer/DiffViewer.ejs.

keyboardInteractions.action: Move focus into the diff region
Expand a collapsed unchanged run (when collapsible=true)

a11y.notes: TODO M5: J/K next/prev change, N/P next/prev file, full roving tabindex + screen-reader line announcements.

components.name: Chart
components.description: Token-aware primitive chart library at @/modules/ui/Chart. M1 ships seven SVG-based charts (Line, Bar, Area, Pie, Donut, Scatter, SparkLine) that consume a unified `Series` data shape. Colors auto-resolve from --primary / --secondary / --success / --warning / --error / --info, so dark mode and theme swaps work without any extra work. Pixel-identical EJS sibling at modules/ui/Chart/Chart.ejs. M3+ stubs (BubbleChart, HeatmapChart, TreemapChart, RadarChart, FunnelChart, SankeyChart, CandlestickChart, GaugeChart) are exported but render null until implemented; see PLANS/38-Charts.md.

a11y.notes: Each chart SVG uses role="img" + aria-label. M5 will add a visually hidden data table for screen-reader parity and keyboard navigation between data points.

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container with raised / flat / outline variants. Supports title, subtitle, headerRight, footer slots and loading skeleton state.

components.name: PageHeader
components.description: Page title + subtitle + optional badge + action buttons. Supports 5 button variants (primary/secondary/outline/danger/ghost); rendered as a link with href or as a button.

components.name: Slider
components.description: Accessible carousel. Includes role="region" + aria-roledescription="carousel" and per-slide aria labels. Supports autoplay, arrow keys, and dot navigation.

components.name: StatCard
components.description: Compact metric display card with value, label, and optional accent color.

components.name: AlertBanner
components.description: Page-level info, success, warning or error message. Announced via role="alert" for screen readers with optional dismissible and action support.

components.name: Toast
components.description: Notification system with success/warning/error/info/loading variants. Hover-to-freeze, progress bar, title, actions, and promise support.

components.name: EmptyState
components.description: Empty-state message shown when there is no data. Supports icon, title, description, and action slots.

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Page navigation control. Collapses large page counts with ellipsis; accessible via aria-label and aria-current="page".

components.name: TabGroup
components.description: Accessible tab navigation following the role="tablist" / role="tab" / role="tabpanel" ARIA pattern. Arrow-key navigation; tabIndex=-1 on inactive tabs.

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Hierarchical navigation trail wrapped in nav aria-label="Breadcrumb". Last item marked with aria-current="page" and aria-hidden separators.

components.name: Stepper
components.description: Multi-step progress indicator with complete, active, error, and pending states. Supports horizontal and vertical orientations.

components.name: TreeView
components.description: Collapsible tree with keyboard navigation, selection, and aria-tree roles.

components.name: TabButton
components.description: Pill-style tab button with active/inactive coloring and an optional count badge.

components.name: ViewToggle
components.description: Horizontal / vertical view toggle control; two-state icon selector. Emits a viewtoggle:change CustomEvent.

components.name: Modal
components.description: Focus-trapped dialog. Closes on Escape and backdrop click. Requires role="dialog" + aria-modal + aria-labelledby; supports sm/md/lg sizes. Uses the shared Overlays focus-trap, scroll-lock and presence hooks; nested modals are layer-aware so Escape only dismisses the topmost panel.

components.name: Drawer
components.description: Side panel sliding in from the screen edge. Left / right placement with focus management and Escape close. Body scroll is locked while open via the shared Overlays useScrollLock hook (iOS rubber-band safe). Accepts closeOnRouteChange (M6 stub).

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Short hint shown on hover and focus. Accessible via role="tooltip" + aria-describedby. Supports 4 placements, 3 themes, optional arrow, and configurable delay.

components.name: DropdownMenu
components.description: Accessible dropdown using role="menu" + role="menuitem". Closes on Escape and outside click. Supports left/right alignment, icons, separators, danger and disabled items, and arrow-key navigation.

components.name: Popover
components.description: Anchor-based contextual panel. Closes on outside click (capture-phase pointerdown) and Escape, layered with sibling overlays. Supports top/bottom/left/right placement. Built-in focus trap (focusTrap prop) keeps Tab cycling inside the panel.

components.name: Table
components.description: Responsive table. scope="col" headers, hover row highlight, empty-state message, and custom cell render support.

components.name: DataTable
components.description: Unified table with `mode="static" | "paginated" | "server"`. Multi-column sort (Shift+click), global search, per-column filter (text + select), pagination, and unified loading/empty/error state.

components.name: AdvancedDataTable
components.description: Enhanced table with row selection (with indeterminate header), expandable rows, and optional sticky header.

components.name: ContentScoreBar
components.description: Rule-based content quality score with Good ≥70 / Fair ≥40 / Poor <40 tier system. Each rule shown as a chip with passed/total count. role="progressbar" + aria-valuenow.

components.name: VideoPlayer
components.description: Custom HTML5 video player. Quality, subtitle, audio track, and playback rate selection; custom WebVTT subtitle overlay; auto-hiding controls; programmatic API. Keyboard shortcuts: Space/K=play, ←→=±10s, ↑↓=volume, M=mute, F=fullscreen.

components.name: ImageGallery
components.description: Responsive image grid with a full-screen lightbox, right-click context menu (open, copy URL, move to first/last, remove), and drag-to-reorder. Supports 2–4 columns, square / video / portrait / auto aspect ratios, optional captions, zoom toggle, thumbnail strip, and full keyboard navigation (← → Escape).

components.name: AppShell
components.description: Full-screen layout wrapper with logo, sidebar and topbar slots. Sidebar renders as an aside on desktop and opens via a drawer on mobile.

components.name: AppSidebar
components.description: Collapsible side navigation. Accepts navGroups or navItems with a built-in collapse toggle. The searchable prop adds an inline filter and a footer slot can host a user block or any content.

components.name: AppTopBar
components.description: Top bar wrapper passed into AppShell's header slot. The logo slot anchors the left side while children (GlobalSearch, UserMenu, Button, etc.) are arranged in a flex row.

components.name: AppNav
components.description: Horizontal navigation bar. Renders inline links on desktop and a hamburger that opens a NavDrawer on mobile. Provides logo, navItems and actions slots.

components.name: NavDrawer
components.description: Wrapper that wraps any trigger and children inside a drawer. Manages its own open/closed state. Used as AppNav's mobile menu and also works standalone.

components.name: UserMenu
components.description: User dropdown opened by a trigger showing avatar, name and role. Accepts a SafeUser prop; the dropdown header shows the name and email.

components.name: GlobalSearch
components.description: Command-palette-style global search field. Supports a categorised result list, keyboard navigation and result selection.

components.name: AppCommandBar
components.description: Keyboard-first command palette. Opens with ⌘K; an items prop accepts custom commands while a default navigation/actions/recent set is included.

components.name: SectionCard
components.description: Titled content card with rounded-xl + border + bg-surface-raised + p-6. Header is separated by an underline; children slot accepts arbitrary content.

components.name: InlineAlert
components.description: Compact inline alert strip used next to form fields or inside cards. success / error / warning / info variants; icon + single-line message.

components.name: StepShell
components.description: Wrapper card for a single step in a multi-step flow. Border and number circle change based on active / done / inactive state; the done + onEdit combination shows an Edit button alongside the summary.

components.name: Form
components.description: Form layout wrapper with title, description, error and actions slots. `columns` prop renders fields in a 1 or 2 column grid.

components.name: FilterBar
components.description: Select, multiselect, daterange and text-based filter panel. Supports URL-based filtering via GET form submit.

components.name: FileUploadSection
components.description: High-level upload organism: drop zone + file list + remove. M1 implements drag/drop, paste-from-clipboard, accept-pattern + maxSize + maxFiles validation. M2 will add image thumbnails + crop dialog; M3 chunked + resumable uploads. Pixel-identical EJS sibling at modules/app/FileUploadSection/FileUploadSection.ejs.

components.name: OnboardingWizard
components.description: Multi-step onboarding flow with dots/bar progress, optional skip, and page or modal presentation. Each step renders its own content slot.

a11y.notes: Progress is announced via role="progressbar" with aria-valuenow updating on step change.

components.name: DetailHeader
components.description: Page header for detail/record views: title, subtitle, status badge, action buttons, and optional tab navigation.

components.name: ErrorState
components.description: Error state pairing an inline alert banner with a centered empty state. Optional retry action.

components.name: NotFoundState
components.description: Not-found / empty record state with optional go-back action.

components.name: LoadingState
components.description: Skeleton loading animations. Variants: spinner / table / cards / list / detail / form.

components.name: SplashScreen
components.description: Full-screen overlay shown during app initialisation. Accepts a logo slot, optional progress bar, and fades out when visible=false.

components.name: MaintenancePage
components.description: Full-page maintenance screen. Optional ETA countdown badge and external status-page link. Use for planned downtime or unplanned outages.

a11y.notes: Screen reader announces the maintenance state via the live region; countdown updates without re-announcing.

components.name: AppBreadcrumbs
components.description: Page header with breadcrumb trail, title, description, and optional status badge. Collapses to a Breadcrumb + dropdown menu on mobile for deep paths.

components.name: AppFooter
components.description: Two-row application footer with logo, navigation links, system status badge, version, copyright, and social slot.

components.name: ThemeSwitcher
components.description: Tri-state theme selector (light / dark / system). Persists the choice to localStorage and toggles the .dark class on <html>. Mounts safely on the server with a placeholder until hydrated.

components.name: ContextMenu
components.description: Right-click context menu. Wraps any element as a trigger. Supports item groups, keyboard shortcuts, separators, danger items, and disabled items. Positions itself via viewport-aware boundary detection, auto-flips when near screen edges. Full keyboard navigation: ↑↓ arrows, Enter, Escape.

components.name: ShareDialog
components.description: Share modal: copyable link, email invitation with permission picker, and a list of current invitees with permission/remove controls.

components.name: CommentThread
components.description: Generic threaded comments with replies, like counts, delete-own actions, and a composer. Domain-agnostic — pass comments + handlers.

components.name: MentionPicker
components.description: @-trigger autocomplete picker. Headless: takes users + query + position, fires onSelect. Keyboard nav (ArrowUp/Down, Enter/Tab, Escape).

components.name: CodeEditor
components.description: Engine-agnostic code editor primitive. M1 ships a lightweight CodeMirror-style fallback engine (textarea + line-number gutter + active-line + theme + readonly + placeholder) so the public API is stable today. Future milestones: Monaco (VSCode) lazy engine, find/replace, multi-cursor, diagnostics (markers), custom autocomplete + hover, minimap, code folding, vim/emacs keymap. Pixel-identical EJS sibling at modules/ui/CodeEditor/CodeEditor.ejs. Used by RulesetEditor M3 + RichTextEditor code-block insert (planned).

keyboardInteractions.action: Move focus into / out of the editor
Move caret + sync active line gutter

components.name: RichTextEditor
components.description: Quill 2.x WYSIWYG editor with token-tinted snow theme. Production features: controlled value, imperative ref API, onBlur, name+hidden-form-sync, drag-and-drop image upload with onImageUpload callback, paste sanitization (Word / GDocs cleanup), char + word counter with maxLength, autosave to localStorage, markdown shortcuts, color + highlight, sub/sup, indent/outdent, horizontal rule, tables, emoji picker, @-mentions, /-slash command menu, selection bubble menu, image resize/align overlay, fullscreen mode. Pixel-identical EJS sibling at modules/app/RichTextEditor.ejs.

components.name: KanbanBoard
components.description: Trello / Linear-style kanban board. M1 ships HTML5-native drag and drop between columns with an inline drop-position indicator (thin line between cards) and full optimistic-UI rewind on rejected onCardMove. Use the canMove hook to gate transitions client-side, or throw from onCardMove to revert. Future milestones: column reorder + collapse + WIP limits (M2), swimlanes + filters + search (M3), inline edit + bulk select + card detail panel (M4), keyboard nav + ARIA announcements (M5), virtualization + auto-archive + dependencies (M6). Pixel-identical EJS sibling at modules/app/KanbanBoard/KanbanBoard.ejs.

keyboardInteractions.action: Pick up a card and drop on any column slot

a11y.notes: M1 uses HTML5 drag-and-drop; each column is role="region" with aria-label, the list is role="list", cards are role="listitem". aria-grabbed (deprecated but still announced by some screen readers) flips on the active card; aria-dropeffect="move" is set on all columns while a drag is in flight. Full keyboard parity ships in M5.

components.name: Calendar
components.description: Month / week / day / agenda / resource calendar with view switcher, full keyboard nav (PageUp/Down + T + arrow keys for day-step), per-event color and icon, all-day bars + timed pills, TR/EN locales, full interactions (anchored popover, drag-move, edge-resize, drag-create), in-house RRULE expansion (FREQ/INTERVAL/COUNT/UNTIL/BYDAY + exceptions), multi-calendar overlay with per-calendar visibility legend, ResourceView lanes with O(n²) conflict highlighting, agenda list (search + date grouping) and a composable MiniCalendar sidebar. WAI-ARIA grid pattern with live-region nav announcements ("Showing May 2026") and event-count cell labels ("Tuesday May 12, 3 events"). Optional Intl.DateTimeFormat-based time formatting for locale-aware clocks.

keyboardInteractions.action: Close popover / cancel drag in progress
Focus the next interactive element (events, nav buttons, legend chips)

a11y.notes: Month view uses role="grid" with role="gridcell" per day. Cells announce "Tuesday May 12, 3 events" via aria-label. View switcher uses role="tablist". Legend chips use role="switch". Nav changes push a polite live-region message ("Showing May 2026"). Drag is direct manipulation (no animated motion), so prefers-reduced-motion is a no-op for the calendar.

components.name: Gantt
components.description: MS Project / GanttPRO / dhtmlxGantt-style project timeline. M1 ships the scale switcher (day / week / month / quarter / year), a vertical Today line, WBS tree with expand/collapse on the left panel, sticky timeline header with synchronised horizontal + vertical scroll, and absolutely-positioned task bars with a %-progress fill. M2 adds full interactivity: drag a bar to reschedule (snap to day), drag the left/right edges to resize, drag the white progress thumb to change %, and drag from the right-edge blue dot to another bar to draw an FS dependency. Dependencies render as orthogonal SVG arrows with a marker-end arrowhead; click an arrow then press Delete to remove it. M3 adds a Critical Path toggle in the toolbar — tasks on the longest dependency chain switch to var(--error) styling and their connecting arrows turn red, computed by a forward + backward longest-path pass on the dependency DAG. Hovering a bar after a short delay shows a tooltip with name, start/end, duration, owner, % complete, predecessors, and a Critical badge. M4 adds zero-duration milestones rendered as 14×14 diamonds, planned-vs-actual baseline ghost bars beneath the live bars, and weekend + holiday shading on the day + week scales. M5 adds a toolbar Export menu (PNG via SVG `<foreignObject>` round-trip, PDF via the browser print dialog, CSV via a pure-JS Blob download), drag snap that nudges drops forward to the next working day, and a resource-conflict detector that flags over-allocated owners in the WBS panel with a red triangle. M6 closes the loop with grid keyboard navigation (↑↓/Home/End/PageUp/PageDown between rows, +/− zoom, focused bar exposes a focus ring + `aria-activedescendant`), a `locale` prop that drives Intl-based month names and tooltip dates, `prefers-reduced-motion` honouring (plus a `reducedMotion` prop force-on), and automatic row virtualization above ~60 tasks. All mutations are optimistic and roll back automatically if `onTaskUpdate` / `onDependencyCreate` rejects. Internal state is owned by a per-instance Zustand store (`store.ts`).

keyboardInteractions.action: Move focus across scale tabs, collapse buttons, and dependency arrows
Activate scale tab or expand/collapse a WBS group
Remove the currently selected dependency arrow
Cancel an in-flight drag or dependency draw

a11y.notes: Root carries role="grid"; the timeline header row is role="row" with each cell role="columnheader". Task bars are role="gridcell" labelled with the task name, dates, and % complete. Resize handles and the progress thumb are <button> elements so they are reachable by assistive tech. Dependency arrows are role="button" with keyboard-activatable selection. Scale switcher is a role="tablist"/role="tab" pair.

components.name: FormBuilder
components.description: Typeform / JotForm-style drag-to-build form designer. M1 ships the field palette (text / email / number / textarea / select / radio / checkbox / date / file — multiselect / signature / rating are palette stubs), a draggable canvas with reorder + duplicate + delete, a right-hand settings panel (label, name, placeholder, helper text, required, default value, options), JSON schema export / import, and a paired FormRenderer with required + email-format validation. Future milestones: full validation engine + custom validators (M2), conditional logic editor + runtime AST eval (M3), multi-page + save & resume (M4), schema I/O + webhooks + signature / rating (M5), full WAI-ARIA / keyboard parity + i18n + theming (M6). Pixel-identical EJS sibling at modules/app/FormBuilder/FormBuilder.ejs.

keyboardInteractions.action: Move focus across palette / canvas / settings
Activate palette item to append a field
Drag from palette → drop into canvas; reorder by dragging the grip handle

a11y.notes: Builder root is role="application" with aria-label. Canvas list is role="list"; each draggable card is role="listitem" with aria-current when selected. FormRenderer adds aria-required + aria-invalid + aria-describedby per field, and surfaces validation messages with role="alert". Full keyboard reorder + LiveRegion announcements land in M6.

components.name: LoginForm
components.description: Email + password sign-in form with inline validation, "Remember me" checkbox, and server-error banner.

components.name: RegisterForm
components.description: Registration form with email, password, and confirm-password fields. Real-time password match validation and server-error support.

components.name: OAuthButtons
components.description: Social sign-in buttons for Google, GitHub, Discord, and Microsoft. Accepts a providers prop to show only a subset.

components.name: UserAvatar
components.description: Avatar that consumes the SafeUser type. Falls back to initials when no profile picture is set; supports online/away/busy/offline status dots.

components.name: UserRoleBadge
components.description: Color-coded badge for ADMIN / AUTHOR / USER roles. ADMIN renders as error (red), AUTHOR as primary (blue), USER as neutral.

components.name: UserStatusBadge
components.description: Color-coded badge for ACTIVE / INACTIVE / BANNED user statuses. Optional dot prop adds a leading status indicator.

components.name: UserMenu
components.description: Avatar + name + role trigger. Dropdown with Profile, Settings, and Sign out items. Closes on outside click.

components.name: PriceDisplay
components.description: Currency formatter using Intl.NumberFormat. Supports any ISO 4217 code and locale. Strikethrough prop renders an original/crossed-out price.

components.name: PaymentStatusBadge
components.description: Color-coded badge for all PaymentStatus values: PENDING / AUTHORIZED / PAID / FAILED / CANCELLED / REFUNDED.

components.name: AddressForm
components.description: Full address form with full name, phone, address lines, city, state/district, postal code, and country. Pre-fillable via the initial prop.

components.name: AddressCard
components.description: Read-only address display card with full name, phone, address lines, city, state, postal code, and country. Supports selected state and optional Edit/Delete actions.

components.name: OrderTotalsCard
components.description: Order summary card showing subtotal, discount, tax, service fee, shipping, and an emphasized total. Zero-value lines are hidden automatically.

components.name: PublishStatusBadge
components.description: Badge for DRAFT / PUBLISHED / ARCHIVED content states with contextual Font Awesome icons. Icon can be hidden via showIcon={false}.

components.name: VisibilityBadge
components.description: Badge for PUBLIC / PRIVATE / UNLISTED visibility states with eye/lock icons. PUBLIC is green, PRIVATE is red, UNLISTED is neutral.

components.name: LanguageSwitcher
components.description: Dropdown language selector using AppLanguage, LANG_NAMES and LANG_FLAGS from I18nTypes. RTL direction is applied per-option automatically.

components.name: ChangePasswordForm
components.description: Current password + new password + confirm fields with match validation and server-error banner.

components.name: UserProfileCard
components.description: Profile card with cover banner, avatar, display name, username, bio, role and status badges, and an optional actions slot.

components.name: UserProfileForm
components.description: Controlled form for editing display name, username, bio, and profile picture URL. Username validation: 3–32 chars, lowercase alphanumeric + underscore.

components.name: UserPreferencesForm
components.description: Preferences form with theme and language selects plus email/push notification and newsletter toggles.

components.name: CouponInput
components.description: Coupon code input with apply/remove flow. Calls onApply which returns success/error; shows applied state once a valid code is accepted.

components.name: DiscountBadge
components.description: Formats and displays a discount: percentage (e.g. "20% off"), fixed amount with currency, or free shipping.

components.name: PaymentMethodSelector
components.description: Radio-group style card selector for payment methods. Shows icon, label, and description. Default set: credit card, debit card, bank transfer, wallet.

components.name: PaymentSummaryCard
components.description: Read-only payment summary card: amount, method, provider, provider reference, and status badge.

components.name: ForgotPasswordForm
components.description: Email input that triggers a password reset link. Shows an inline success state after submission instead of a redirect.

components.name: SessionExpiredBanner
components.description: Warning banner shown when the user session has expired. Includes a "Sign in again" action button.

components.name: SeoForm
components.description: SEO metadata form: title (60 char limit), meta description (160 char limit), and keyword tag input with character counters.

components.name: SeoPreview
components.description: Google search result preview card. Shows title, URL, and description with character count indicators. Empty fields render placeholder text.

components.name: AddressSelector
components.description: Selectable list of saved addresses built on AddressCard. Supports add, edit, and delete callbacks.

components.name: LocationPicker
components.description: Location form with country selector (countries-list), city, state, postal code, and optional lat/lng. 2-column grid layout.

components.name: GeoPointDisplay
components.description: Displays latitude/longitude coordinates with a Google Maps link. Configurable precision and optional label.

components.name: ProcessingStatusIndicator
components.description: Animated status indicator for UPLOADING / PROCESSING / READY / FAILED states. Optional progress bar with percentage.

components.name: CurrencySelector
components.description: Currency dropdown built from countries-list. Deduped, alphabetically sorted ISO 4217 currency codes.

components.name: CountrySelector
components.description: Country dropdown built from countries-list. Shows flag + full name + ISO2 code. Supports search by name or code, error/hint states.

components.name: DirectionProvider
components.description: Context provider that sets dir="rtl"/"ltr" on a wrapper div based on the active language. useDirection() hook exposes lang, dir, isRTL.

components.name: CreditCardVisual
components.description: Animated 3-D flip credit card. Front shows number, name, expiry; back shows CVV strip. Supports VISA, Mastercard, AMEX, Discover.

components.name: CreditCardForm
components.description: Full credit card entry form with live card visual preview. Auto-detects brand, formats number, flips card on CVV focus, validates expiry.

components.name: SavedCardSelector
components.description: Radio-group list of saved payment cards. Shows brand badge, masked number, expiry, and default indicator. Supports remove and add-new callbacks.

components.name: NotFoundPage
components.description: Full-page 404 screen with a gradient "404" heading, icon slot, title, description, and home/back action buttons.

components.name: ChatBox
components.description: Floating chat widget that anchors to the bottom-right of the screen. Includes a FAB toggle, collapsible panel, scrollable message list with typing indicator, and an auto-growing textarea input.

components.name: NotificationMenu
components.description: Bell icon button with unread count badge. Opens a dropdown panel showing notification items grouped by read/unread state with variant color dots, timestamps, and mark-all-read / view-all actions.

components.name: SubscriptionPlanCard
components.description: Subscription plan card displaying name, price with currency formatting, billing interval, and feature list with checkmarks. Highlights the popular and current plans. Accepts onSelect callback for plan switching.

components.name: Charts
components.description: react-chartjs-2 chart components wrapped in Cards: Bar, Line, Doughnut, Radar, and Polar Area.

components.name: CheckoutSuccessState
components.description: Success screen shown after checkout completion; includes a confirmation icon, payment summary, and optional delivery address.

components.name: PostStatusBadge
components.description: Color-coded dot-badge for blog post status. PUBLISHED (green), DRAFT (amber), SCHEDULED (blue), ARCHIVED (neutral). Extends common/PublishStatusBadge by adding the SCHEDULED value.

components.name: CategoryBadge
components.description: Renders a category name as a small primary-colored pill. Accepts Pick<Category, "title" | "slug"> — the full Category object is not required.

components.name: PostMeta
components.description: Inline row showing author avatar, name, publish date, estimated read time, and view count. Read time is calculated by stripping HTML tags and dividing word count by 200.

components.name: PostContent
components.description: Renders HTML blog content with token-based typography styles. Separate styles are defined for h1–h3, p, a, ul/ol, blockquote, code, pre, img, hr, and table.

components.name: PostCard
components.description: Listing card consuming PostWithData. Composed of cover image, category badge, title, description, and a PostMeta row. href renders an <a>, onClick a <button>, neither a plain <div>.

components.name: CommentForm
components.description: Name, email, and content comment form with inline validation. Providing parentId switches it to reply mode; onCancel shows a Cancel button.

components.name: CommentItem
components.description: Single comment with initials-fallback avatar, name, date, content, and a Reply button. At depth < 1, clicking Reply opens an inline CommentForm; nested replies are indented with a left border.

components.name: CommentList
components.description: Filters to PUBLISHED comments, groups them 2 levels deep by parentId, and appends a new-comment form. Shows an encouraging empty state when there are no comments.

components.name: AuthorBioCard
components.description: Author profile header with avatar, bio, role/verified badges, and social links.

components.name: TopicCloud
components.description: Weighted tag cloud where each topic is sized by its post count.

components.name: AuthorStatsRow

components.name: EventStatusBadge
components.description: Etkinlik durumunu (PUBLISHED, SOLD_OUT, CANCELLED…) renkli badge ile gösterir.

components.name: EventFormatBadge

components.name: EventCategoryBadge
components.description: Etkinlik kategorisini chip olarak gösterir; href verilirse tıklanabilir bağlantıya dönüşür.

components.name: EventCard
components.description: 16:9 görsel, fiyat pill, kategori/durum/format badge ve organizatör bilgisi içeren tam etkinlik kartı.

components.name: OrganizerCard
components.description: Organizatör logo/baş harfleri, isim, doğrulanmış rozetleri ve iletişim bağlantılarını gösterir.

components.name: SectionPricingCard
components.description: Bilet kategorisi seçim kartı; −/+ adet kontrolü, kapasite uyarısı ve seçili durumu içerir.

components.name: TicketCard
components.description: Kesik çizgili ayırıcı ve SVG QR koduyla tam bilet görseli.

components.name: EventInfoGrid
components.description: Etkinlik detay sayfası için tarih/saat, mekan, format ve doluluk oranı bilgilerini düzenli bir kart içinde gösterir.

components.name: TicketSidebarBox
components.description: Etkinlik detay sayfasının yapışkan sağ kenar çubuğu: fiyat başlığı, fiyatlandırma listesi, satın al butonu ve harita.

components.name: StepIndicator
components.description: Ödeme akışı (Biletler → Bilgiler → Ödeme → Onay) için 4 adımlı ilerleme göstergesi.

components.name: CheckoutSuccess
components.description: Başarılı ödeme sonrası gösterilen onay ekranı: QR bilet, sipariş özeti, yazdır/geri dön butonları.

components.name: SeatMapPicker
components.description: Görsel koltuk seçim haritası: section/subsection sekme desteği, sıra-koltuk grid, renk kodlu durum, erişilebilirlik göstergesi.

components.name: HeroSlide

components.name: NavDropdown

components.name: CityPicker

components.name: NavLanguageSwitcher
components.description: Event koyu nav barına özel dil seçici; bayrak emojileri ve seçili işareti. Mevcut LanguageSwitcher'dan bağımsız koyu tema variant'ı.

components.name: NavThemeSwitcher
components.description: Event koyu nav barına özel tema değiştirici (Açık / Koyu / Sistem); localStorage'a yazar ve html.dark class'ını yönetir.

components.name: EventOrderStatusBadge
components.description: Sipariş durumu rozeti; PAID / REFUNDED / CANCELLED renk şeması, iki boyut seçeneği.

components.name: TicketRowMeta + TicketRowActions
components.description: Bilet listesi satırı başlığı: etkinlik küçük resmi, durum rozeti (TicketRowMeta) ve yazdır / paylaş butonları (TicketRowActions).

components.name: MapView
components.description: Leaflet-based interactive map. Tooltip-enabled markers, predefined zones (polygon), route lines (polyline), and click-to-add marker mode.

components.name: StatusCodeBadge
components.description: Displays an HTTP status code with a semantic color and an optional human-readable label.

components.name: HttpMethodBadge
components.description: Color-coded badge for HTTP methods — GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, and more.

components.name: SecurityBadge
components.description: Inline badge representing an API security scheme type with a matching icon and color.

components.name: SecuritySchemeBadge
components.description: Badge variant of SecurityBadge that uses the design-system Badge component for consistent styling.

components.name: SchemaViewer
components.description: Interactive JSON Schema tree viewer with type coloring, constraint display, and collapsible nodes.

components.name: ParameterTable
components.description: Table displaying API parameters with location (path/query/header/cookie), type, required flag, and description.

components.name: ResponseCard
components.description: Collapsible card for a single API response showing the status code, description, and response body schema.

components.name: CodeSamplePanel
components.description: Dark-themed panel showing code samples in multiple languages with tab switching and a one-click copy button.

components.name: EndpointRow
components.description: Collapsible row representing a single API endpoint — shows the method badge, path, summary, and expands to an OperationPanel.

components.name: ServerSelector

components.name: ApiTagSection
components.description: Collapsible section grouping endpoints under a named tag — the primary navigation unit in API documentation.

components.name: OperationPanel
components.description: Tabbed panel showing all details of an API operation — parameters, request body, responses, and code samples.

components.name: AuthSchemeCard

components.name: OAuthFlowDiagram

components.name: ApiKeyTokenCard

components.name: FeatureCard

components.name: FeatureGrid

components.name: PricingGrid

components.name: TestimonialCard

components.name: TestimonialGrid
components.description: Masonry columns grid of TestimonialCard components with a centred heading block. Uses CSS columns for the masonry effect — cards automatically balance across columns.

components.name: FaqAccordion
components.description: Accessible accordion for FAQ items using aria-expanded + aria-controls. By default only one item is open at a time; allowMultiple enables concurrent open items. First item is pre-opened.

components.name: StatsBar
components.description: Social proof stats display in two variants. band renders a full-width <dl> grid with dividers; cards renders a grid of bordered stat cards.

components.name: TeamMemberCard
components.description: Centered team card showing avatar (or initials fallback), name, role, optional bio, and social link icons for LinkedIn, X (Twitter), and GitHub.

components.name: PartnerLogosStrip
components.description: Horizontal strip of grayscale partner logos. On hover the logo transitions to full colour. Logos with a url prop are wrapped in an accessible <a>.

components.name: HowItWorksSection
components.description: Process steps section in two layouts. horizontal shows numbered/icon circles in a row connected by a dashed line. vertical stacks them with a timeline connector.

components.name: AnnouncementBar
components.description: Dismissible top-of-page banner for promotions and announcements. Supports an optional icon, rich message content, a CTA link, and a dismiss button. Renders null once dismissed.

components.name: MegaMenu
components.description: Compound component for hover-activated mega menus. Composed of MegaMenu.Root, Trigger, Panel, Section, Item, Footer, and FeaturedCard sub-components. Use useMegaMenu() to share open/close state across multiple menus. Includes an invisible hover bridge that prevents the gap between the trigger and panel from closing the menu.

components.name: KUIViewer
components.description: Browser-based IFC/BIM 3D viewer built on Three.js, web-ifc and @thatopen/fragments. Ships a vanilla TypeScript core plus an optional React subpath (`kui-viewer/react`) exposing the `<KUIViewer />` component, a `ViewerProvider`, and a Zustand-backed `useViewerStore` hook for selection, federation and spatial-tree state.
components.whenToUse: When you need to render IFC/BIM models in the browser — viewing, navigating and inspecting AEC scenes — and want a framework-agnostic core with an optional React wrapper.
components.whenNotToUse: For lightweight, non-BIM 3D scenes — prefer a thinner Three.js wrapper or react-three-fiber. KUIViewer pulls in web-ifc WASM and @thatopen/fragments and is sized for AEC workloads.
